data.title: Norwegian Air Shuttle Shows Strong Passenger Growth and Prepares for Busy Summer
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Norwegian Air Shuttle ASA ( (GB:0FGH) ) has shared an update.

Norwegian Air Shuttle ASA’s passenger numbers rose notably in January, with a 12% increase for Norwegian and a 19% increase for Widerøe compared to the previous year. Despite a slight decline in punctuality attributed to winter weather, the company expanded its capacity significantly and plans to focus on cost efficiency and improved capacity utilization in 2025. The group is gearing up for a busy summer season with the addition of new aircraft and routes, reflecting strong customer demand.

More about Norwegian Air Shuttle ASA

Norwegian Air Shuttle ASA, a leading airline group in Norway, operates in the aviation industry providing air travel services. Together with its subsidiary Widerøe, it serves a significant portion of the Norwegian air travel market, offering a wide range of routes and destinations.

data.description:

Fujimori Kogyo Co ( (JP:7917) ) has shared an announcement.

ZACROS Corporation announced a resolution by its Board of Directors to repurchase up to 500,000 shares of its common stock, representing 2.69% of shares issued and outstanding, excluding treasury stock. This repurchase aims to implement a flexible capital policy in response to changes in its business environment, with a maximum purchase price of ¥2,000 million, to be conducted via market purchase through the Tokyo Stock Exchange from February 7, 2025, to September 30, 2025.

data.title: Balfour Beatty Advances Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Balfour Beatty ( (GB:BBY) ) has shared an update.

Balfour Beatty announced the repurchase of 125,000 of its ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buyback program. The shares were bought at a volume-weighted average price of 455.8599 pence and will be held in treasury, impacting the total number of voting rights to 514,509,027. This move is part of the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and could influence shareholder interest as governed by the FCA’s Disclosure and Transparency Rules.

More about Balfour Beatty

Balfour Beatty is a leading international infrastructure group with 26,000 employees. The company is involved in financing, developing, building, maintaining, and operating complex infrastructure projects globally. Notable projects include Hinkley Point C in the UK, the Lyric Theatre in Hong Kong, and the Automated People Mover at Los Angeles International Airport.

PayPoint plc has announced a buyback of 12,228 ordinary shares as part of its share repurchase program, with plans to cancel these shares. data.description:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Tesco plc ( (GB:TSCO) ) has issued an update.

Tesco PLC announced the purchase and cancellation of 245,944 ordinary shares as part of its £1 billion share buyback program. The transaction, executed on 05 February 2025, was conducted on the London Stock Exchange and reflects Tesco’s strategic effort to enhance shareholder value. The cancellation of these shares impacts the total number of ordinary shares in circulation, providing a new denominator for shareholders and stakeholders to assess their interest in the company.

More about Tesco plc

Tesco PLC is a leading multinational retailer headquartered in the UK, specializing in groceries and general merchandise. As one of the largest retailers globally, Tesco operates an extensive network of stores, serving millions of customers worldwide with a focus on providing quality products at competitive prices.

data.title: Comptoir Group PLC Appoints Chaker Hanna as New CEO Amid Strategic Leadership Changes
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Comptoir ( (GB:COM) ) has provided an update.

Comptoir Group PLC has announced the reappointment of Chaker Hanna as Chief Executive Officer, effective immediately, following the departure of Nick Ayerst. Chaker brings over 15 years of experience at the CEO level, including a previous tenure at Comptoir, where he played a key role in the company’s public listing and expansion. This leadership change is accompanied by the departure of Ali Aneizi as Independent Non-Executive Director, with a search for his replacement underway. A new voting agreement between Chaker and Tony Kitous, the company’s Creative Director and Founder, has been established to ensure unified decision-making regarding board appointments and other significant resolutions, reflecting a strategic approach to governance that could impact the company’s future direction and stakeholder relations.

More about Comptoir

Comptoir Group PLC is a prominent owner and operator of 27 Lebanese, Middle Eastern, and North African inspired restaurants, with a significant presence in the UK and international markets. Their flagship brand, Comptoir Libanais, consists of 22 locations, including in major cities such as London, Manchester, and Milan, offering a casual dining experience with authentic regional cuisine. The group also operates brands like Shawa and Yalla-Yalla, with an international expansion through franchise partnerships in the Netherlands, Qatar, UAE, and Italy.

INTAGE Holdings Inc. ( (JP:4326) ) just unveiled an update.

INTAGE Holdings Inc. announced a resolution for distributing interim dividends from surplus for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2025. The interim dividend is set at 22.50 yen per share, aligning with the company’s strategy to balance profit distribution with growth investments. This move, part of their medium-term management plan, aims to increase shareholder returns and encourage share retention, highlighting a progressive approach to dividend payouts.

INTAGE Holdings Inc. operates in the market research and consulting industry. The company provides various services focused on consumer insights, data analytics, and market intelligence, catering to businesses seeking informed decision-making and strategic planning.

Great Divide Mining Ltd ( (AU:GDM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Great Divide Mining Ltd announced a change in the director’s interest in securities, specifically involving Adam Arkinstall. The transaction, an on-market purchase, resulted in the acquisition of 23,123 fully paid ordinary shares valued at $9,664.
